Soul 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 soul mana to play this card.)[/i]
{3}, Exert, Destroy a card you control named “Deoth Spectra”: Attack 4. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 4 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 4 endurance counter from it.)[/i]
Whenever you attack for the first time each turn, attack 1.
